mapper.sql: select pm.id, pm.project_id, pm.payment_type, pm.amount, pm.pay_time, pm.pay_unit, pm.pay_method, pm.extra_data::text as extra_data, pm.del_flag, pm.create_by, pm.create_time, pm.update_by, pm.update_time, pm.remark from proj_payment pm
mapper.select: select pm.id, pm.project_id, pm.payment_type, pm.amount, pm.pay_time, pm.pay_unit, pm.pay_method, pm.extra_data::text as extra_data, pm.del_flag, pm.create_by, pm.create_time, pm.update_by, pm.update_time, pm.remark, p.project_name from proj_payment pm left join proj_project p on p.id = pm.project_id where pm.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into proj_payment( project_id, payment_type, amount, pay_time, pay_unit, pay_method, extra_data, remark, create_by, create_time )values( #{projectId}, #{paymentType}, #{amount}, #{payTime}, #{payUnit}, #{payMethod}, #{extraData}::jsonb, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now() )
mapper.delete:
update proj_payment set del_flag = '2' where id in
#{id}
